inline_comments.message: by doing this I believe you are ignoring the extended notation of an artifact implementation and assuming that it will be a short notation. Please check the TOSCA 1.3 documentation, section 3.6.16 "Operation implementation definition".

Operation implementation in relationship_template is limited to short notation only. So its always string value. There is no scope for any other details to add in UI. Also checked this code is relationship_template specific only. I would prefer to make changes here rather than during tosca download. Your thoughts on this please.

This code does not seems to be used only by relationship templates, as it was introduced before the support for relationship templates by this ticket: https://jira.onap.org/browse/SDC-3768.
This seems to be used for the interface operation in general, where you can have a short or extended notation.
So it is better to fix the TOSCA generation for the relationship_templates only.

Rechecking here, it seems that the code is only used for the relationship part as you specified before.
We can keep this change. As you said, we don't have support for the extended notation in the relationship template.
Apologies for the disturbance.
Thanks for re-testing and reconfirming on that Andre.
